description_long: This is a robust, rectangular wooden crate or cabinet with a light, natural wood finish. The structure features vertical slats on all visible sides, framed by thicker wooden beams at the edges and corners, giving it a reinforced appearance. The top surface is flat and bordered, with recessed panels that mirror the slatted design of the sides. The wood grain and occasional knots are visible, adding a rustic and utilitarian character. There are no visible handles, hinges, or openings, suggesting it is a solid, closed container. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use as a storage box, planter, or urban furniture in parks or public spaces.
description: A sturdy, light-colored wooden crate or cabinet with vertical slats and a flat, bordered top. Its simple, reinforced design is rustic and utilitarian.
description_view_0: This view shows the front face with three vertical slats framed by thick wooden beams and a flat, bordered top.
description_view_1: The side view is nearly identical to the front, with the same slatted pattern and reinforced corners.
description_view_2: This angle reveals another side with a similar slatted design, highlighting the uniformity of the structure.
description_view_3: The final view shows the last side, again with vertical slats and a flat top, consistent with the other faces.
